justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "the day after tomorrow" as Wednesday, June 3rd, and then "Thursday morning" as Thursday, June 4th.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternatives when the initial request was unavailable, offering two suitable slots on the next available day.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in three turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the desired appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent gracefully recovered from the initial unavailability by offering relevant alternative times without losing context.
